name: Grilled Tuna with Pineapple-Ginger Glaze
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon freshly ground white pepper (or black)
2 pounds tuna steaks, cut into portions or four 8-oz steaks, about 1.5 inches thick
salt and freshly cracked black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the ginger, pineapple juice, vinegar, soy sauce, brown sugar, and bring to a boil over high heat.
2. Reduce heat to low and simmer until the volume is reduced by half, about 20 minutes.
3. Add ketchup and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Remove from heat, stir in lime juice, cilantro, and white or black pepper. Set aside.
5. Season tuna generously with salt and pepper.
6. Grill over medium heat for about 3 minutes per side, or until a finger inserted into the center yields some pink (medium rare). Cook longer if desired.
7. During the last minute of cooking, brush each steak with a couple of tablespoons of glaze.
8. Remove tuna steaks from the grill, top each with a tablespoon or two of glaze, and serve immediately. Pass remaining glaze separately.
Serves 4. [Per serving: 390 calories, 2 grams fat, 100 milligrams cholesterol, 1,475 milligrams sodium.]
